reasoning: Customer Diana Foster has a history of 33 orders with 13 legitimate size-exchange returns (no fraud indicators, net revenue $4186.69). However, the order confirmation email was not sent (per system note), which may have caused confusion. Given the customer's clean history and to maintain trust, approve the refund as a goodwill gesture while recommending product verification for future orders.
